stemHtml: FASTAIR 345 receives a TCAS Traffic Advisory (TA). Must it be reported to ATC?

options.a: Yes — report "FASTAIR 345, TCAS TA" because traffic is on the display.
options.b: Yes — TAs must always be reported using standard phraseology.
options.c: No — ATC has a separate alert system.
options.d: No — but Resolution Advisories requiring deviation from ATC clearance must be reported.
